name: k8s-debug
description: Kubernetes diagnostic playbook for Claude Code. Use when the user reports Pod/Deployment/Service/Namespace issues — CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, ImagePullBackOff, Pending pods, failed Helm releases, broken Ingress, or unhealthy nodes. Diagnoses via kubectl/helm; runs locally when host alias is `local`, otherwise through ssh-core. Read-only — does not deploy, scale, or apply. Pair with ssh-guarded for write operations.
